titleStmt.title: SII 4.799: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 799. (A.R. No. 339 of 1892). ON THE THIRD STONE IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
parīdhāvisaṁvatsara Āśvija
svasti . śrī śrīparuvataśrīsvayaṁbhuśrīliṁggacekra[va¨rtti]
śrīma(ṁ)nmallikā¨rjunamahāliṁgadēvadivyaśrīpādapadmārādhakula
yina śrīkayilāsaṁmīṁdi dēvāpṛthivimahāmaha(ṁ)ttumukhya
mayina siddhabhikṣāvrittiAyaṁgāri Āgñādhārulayina kemi
dēvaniśāṁtayagāru tāḍiparati rāmayaliṁggamunu
pūjasēsi daṁḍaṁsama¨rpiṁcinū peruguṁnu dēvuniki nokapaḷeya
ṁ naḍacēAṭugānu kaṭaḍasēsi taṁmaḷa cirucila rāmajīla
gāriki yicina dha¨rmaśāsanaṁ śrīmallikā¨rjunadēvuniki [A]mṛ
tapaḷakuṁ cellē yiruvuṭi varivittanālu vārē polamuṁnu mēmu mā
kuṁ buṁṇeṁgā tāṭiparati rāmayadēvuniki nityakṛtyamai mā pēriṭanu
voka Avasarapaḷeṁ nayivēdyaṁ sāgēAṭugānu kaṭaḍasēśi Ā yiruvuṭi
varivitulu vārē polamu(ṁ)nnu yistimi . gāna mīru dinapratini tapakuṁḍānu
mākuṁ buṇyaṁgānu rāmayadēvaraku vokapaḷeṁkaṭṭaḍa nayivēdyaṁ tappaku
ṁḍānu sēyi(ṁ)stu(ṁ)nnu Āpolaṁ mīruvyavasāya paracukonēdi . yī
dha¨rmmaṁ tappakuṁḍānu yellakālamu(ṁ)nnu sāgi(ṁ) stimi . gāna yiṁduku yēmiṁ
ni vicāriṁcaka Āpolaṁ vyavasāyaparacukonēdi . Āceṁdrā¨rkkastāyi AI
naḍacēAṭugānu dhārāpū¨rvakaṁ sēsi Istimi . gāna Iṁdu
Digital edition of SII 4.799 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
